profiles.name: interactive
profiles.description: User is present. Ask only when necessary. Prefer small safe steps.

profiles.name: batch
profiles.description: Bounded autonomous work. Stop on ambiguity or failed checks.

profiles.name: overnight_safe
profiles.description: Unattended conservative work. No destructive actions, no credential work, no unbounded scope.

profiles.name: overnight_aggressive
profiles.description: Generation or analysis only. Never for writes, secrets, deletion, production deploys, or external side effects.
